I'm pursuing a B.Sc. in Cyber Security at the University of Applied Sciences Mannheim, with a deep focus on cryptography — post-quantum systems in particular — and offensive security in all its forms.

I work as a penetration tester at ERNW in Heidelberg, where real-world client pentests are the day job. Outside of that I train methodically through HackTheBox and OffSec Proving Grounds. The current goal: get sharper at offsec — technically and systematically — while keeping one foot in post-quantum cryptography research.
A lot of what I learn and build ends up documented here on the blog. Including the stuff that doesn't work on the first five attempts.
